zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Delves I於1350年出生在英國英格蘭爾多丁頓時，他的父親Henry Delves25歲，母親Katherine Arderne28歲。他於大約1375年與Margaret De Calveley結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德被列為sheriff of stafford。他去世於1394年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Delves I于1350年出生在英国英格兰爾多丁頓时，他的父亲Henry Delves25岁，母亲Katherine Arderne28岁。他于大约1375年与Margaret De Calveley结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德被列为sheriff of stafford。他去世于1394年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Delves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Delve , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Delve
meanings: English: locative name, nickname from Middle English delf, delphe, delve ‘pit, quarry, canal, ditch’, denoting someone who lived by a pit, quarry, or excavation, or, in some instances, a ditcher, digger, or quarrier (Middle English delver(er)); compare William le Deluer, 1230 in Pipe Rolls (Somerset). Lettice atte Delue, 1357, cited below, is probably to be associated with John Delvere, 1359 in Colchester Court Rolls (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John De Delves I was born in 1350, in Doddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Delves, was 25 and his mother, Katherine Arderne, was 28. He married Margaret De Calveley about 1375. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as sheriff of stafford in Stafford, Staffordshire, England. He died in 1394, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Delves I est né en 1350, à Doddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Delves, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Katherine Arderne, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Calveley environ 1375. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of stafford à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1394, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Delves I 1350 in Doddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Delves 25 und seine Mutter Katherine Arderne 28. Er hat um 1375 Margaret De Calveley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of stafford in Stafford, Staffordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1394 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Delves I è nato il nel 1350 nel Doddington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Delves, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Arderne, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Calveley circa 1375. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of stafford nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England. Morì nel 1394, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Delves Iが1350年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアドッドイントンで生まれた時，父Henry Delvesは25歳，母Katherine Arderneは28歳であった。約1375年にMargaret De Calveleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードでの職業はsheriff of staffordと記録されている。彼は1394年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Delves I(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 도딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Delves(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Arderne(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1375년 Margaret De Calveley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 sheriff of stafford이었다. 그는 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Delves I nasceu em 1350, em Doddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Delves, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Arderne, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Calveley aproximadamente 1375. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of stafford em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1394, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Delves I родился в 1350 г. в местности доддингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Delves было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Arderne, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Calveley около 1375 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of stafford в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия. Он умер в 1394 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John De Delves I nació en 1350, en Doddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Delves, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Katherine Arderne, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret De Calveley aproximadamente 1375. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of stafford en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1394, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
